Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}So, us experiments can't even stand up to a naturally awakened Persona...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}For us, it's not so simple... Our powers weren't awakened naturally. We can't even use 'em without straining our bodies.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Don't you remember what your dead pal was carrying...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}So, you were giving Shinji the suppressants...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You guys don't have the slightest clue what'll happen if the Dark Hour disappears... do you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}It won't matter for normal people, since they don't remember anything anyway...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But without the Dark Hour, even Persona-users like us will—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Now then... Ordinarily, we would withdraw here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}But that is not an option tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}This body, ephemeral though it may be... is worthless without my power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Therefore, I've only one choice... I shall prove my existence here and now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}But... I haven't forgotten what you said to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}You win... Go on and defeat the Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Maybe then you'll see what you've been fightin' for this whole time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I'd rather die than surrender to you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Take a good look! This is how we live![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Don't let it get to you. They chose how they wanted to go out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Our real target is waiting... Let's just focus on that for now.[n]{f 1 1}
